landing.heroTitle: Turn your social media into a
landing.heroDescription: Create a beautiful storefront in minutes. Share a link and turn followers into customers — no coding needed.
landing.heroTrialNote: 14-day free trial — no credit card required
landing.step1Desc: Sign up, name your store, and add your products. It takes less than 2 minutes.
landing.step2Desc: Share your store link on Instagram, TikTok, or WhatsApp. Customers browse, order, and you manage everything from your dashboard.
landing.step3Desc: Customers browse, order via cash on delivery, and you get notified instantly.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to sell online
landing.featureReadyDesc: Create your store, add products, share the link. That simple.
landing.featureMobileDesc: Your store looks perfect on phones — where your customers are.
landing.featureCodDesc: Cash on delivery. No online payment setup needed.
landing.featureDesignDesc: Custom colors, fonts, themes, and layout. Make your store truly yours.
landing.featureCollectionsDesc: Organize products into collections. Support sizes, colors, and more.
landing.featureAnalyticsDesc: Track confirmation rate, delivery rate, return rate, and revenue by status — with a full COD order funnel.
landing.featureCartRecoveryDesc: Automatically recover abandoned carts via WhatsApp. Bring back customers who left without ordering.
landing.featureIntegrationsDesc: Connect WhatsApp, Meta Pixel, TikTok Events API, Google Sheets, and Google Analytics to automate your workflow.
landing.featureDomainDesc: Connect your own domain for a professional storefront.
landing.featureLanguageDesc: Serve your customers in 20 languages including Arabic (RTL), French, Spanish, Turkish, and more.
landing.featureShippingDesc: Set delivery rates per country with city-level overrides. Fees auto-convert for multi-market stores.
landing.featureMarketsDesc: Sell to different regions with local currencies and custom pricing per market.
landing.featureReviewsDesc: Build trust with verified purchase reviews. Customers rate products after delivery, and you control what gets published.
landing.featureCustomersDesc: Build customer profiles automatically from every order. Track purchase history, add tags, write notes, and export data — your built-in CRM.
landing.featureAntifraudDesc: Protect your checkout with SMS OTP verification and CAPTCHA. Verify real phone numbers before orders are placed.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Everything you need to run your store. Cancel anytime.
landing.pricingDescription: No tiers, no upsells. You get every feature we build.
landing.pricingTrialNote: 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Get your store up and running in under 2 minutes
landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything included in one simple plan
landing.faq1Question: Do I need any technical skills?
landing.faq1Answer: Not at all. Leadivo is designed for non-technical users. You can create your store, add products, and have your store live and ready to receive orders in under 2 minutes.
landing.faq2Answer: Your customers order via cash on delivery (COD). No online payment gateway or merchant account is needed.
landing.faq3Question: Can I use my own domain?
landing.faq3Answer: Yes! You can connect your own custom domain for a professional storefront. We provide step-by-step DNS setup instructions.
landing.faq4Question: What happens after the free trial?
landing.faq4Answer: After your 14-day free trial, simply subscribe for $19/month to keep your store running. You won't lose any of your products or settings.
landing.faq5Question: Can I sell in multiple languages?
landing.faq5Answer: Yes. Leadivo storefronts support 20 languages including Arabic (full RTL), French, Spanish, Turkish, Portuguese, and more. The dashboard is available in English, French, and Arabic.
landing.faq6Question: Can I sell in different currencies?
landing.faq6Answer: Yes! With Markets, you can create regions like "North America" (USD) and "Europe" (EUR) with automatic or fixed pricing per market. Customers are auto-detected by country.
landing.faq7Answer: You set a default delivery rate per country, then optionally override it for specific cities or exclude cities entirely. If your store uses multi-market pricing, delivery fees auto-convert at the same exchange rate. Customers see the fee at checkout before placing their order.
landing.faq8Question: How does abandoned cart recovery work?
landing.faq8Answer: When a customer starts checkout but leaves without ordering, Leadivo automatically sends them a WhatsApp recovery message with a link to complete their purchase. This runs every 30 minutes — no manual work needed.
landing.faq9Question: Can I track my order confirmation and delivery rates?
landing.faq9Answer: Yes! The COD analytics dashboard shows your confirmation rate, delivery rate, return rate, a visual order funnel, and revenue broken down by status — all built specifically for COD businesses.
landing.faq10Question: Can customers leave reviews on my store?
landing.faq10Answer: Yes! After an order is delivered, customers receive a review link via WhatsApp. They can rate products, write comments, and add photos. You can moderate all reviews before they appear on your store.
landing.faq11Question: Do I get a customer database?
landing.faq11Answer: Every order automatically creates a customer profile with contact info, purchase history, and lifetime stats. You can tag customers (VIP, Wholesale, etc.), add notes, and export your database anytime.
landing.faq12Question: How do I protect my store from fake COD orders?
landing.faq12Answer: Leadivo offers built-in fake order protection with SMS OTP phone verification and hCaptcha at checkout. When enabled, customers must confirm their phone number with a 4-digit code before placing a COD order — reducing fake orders and failed deliveries. Toggle it on from the Design Builder's Security tab.
landing.ctaDescription: Join 500+ sellers already using Leadivo. Set up your store in under 2 minutes.
landing.heroDescriptionCountry: Create your ecommerce store in {{country}} in 2 minutes. Cash on delivery, COD analytics, WhatsApp notifications, and local currency pricing — no coding needed.
landing.ctaDescriptionCountry: 500+ sellers in {{country}} already use Leadivo. Create your store for free in under 2 minutes.
landing.previewDescription: Every store on Leadivo is designed to convert. Mobile-first, fast, and fully customizable to match your brand.
landing.previewFeature1: Fully customizable storefront to match your brand
landing.previewFeature2: Product collections, variants, and smart search

compare.ctaDescription: Set up your store in 2 minutes. 14-day free trial, no credit card needed.
compare.indexSubtitle: Leadivo is purpose-built for social sellers and COD businesses. See how it fits your needs.
compare.woocommercePriceNote: * WooCommerce is free but requires paid hosting ($10+/mo), SSL, themes, and plugins.
compare.strength.multiMarket: Multi-market pricing with auto currency conversion
compare.strength.20langs: 20 languages with full Arabic RTL support
compare.highlight.codFirst.title: Built for COD
compare.highlight.codFirst.desc: Track confirmation, delivery, and return rates with a purpose-built COD analytics dashboard. Know exactly how your business is performing.
compare.highlight.instant.title: Ready in 2 minutes
compare.highlight.instant.desc: Sign up, add products, share your link. Your store is live and ready to receive orders immediately.
compare.highlight.social.title: Made for social sellers
compare.highlight.social.desc: Share your store link on Instagram, TikTok, or WhatsApp. Your followers browse, order, and you manage everything from your dashboard.
compare.highlight.noSetup.title: Zero setup needed
compare.highlight.noSetup.desc: Fully hosted with automatic updates. No servers, no plugins, no maintenance — just focus on selling.
compare.highlight.allInOne.title: All-in-one platform
compare.highlight.allInOne.desc: WhatsApp, Meta CAPI, Google Sheets, shipping, discounts, and multi-market pricing — all included with no extra plugins.
compare.highlight.codAnalytics.title: COD analytics
compare.highlight.codAnalytics.desc: Track confirmation rate, delivery rate, return rate, and revenue by status — metrics designed specifically for COD businesses.
compare.highlight.whatsappRecovery.title: WhatsApp cart recovery
compare.highlight.whatsappRecovery.desc: Automatically send recovery messages via WhatsApp to customers who started checkout. Runs every 30 minutes.
compare.highlight.multiMarket.title: Multi-market selling
compare.highlight.multiMarket.desc: Sell to different countries with local currencies, automatic exchange rates, and market-specific pricing — all from one store.
compare.highlight.global.title: Built for global reach
compare.highlight.global.desc: 20 languages, multi-market pricing, and local currency support help you sell across borders from day one.
compare.shopify.knownFor: A powerful, full-featured ecommerce platform used by millions of businesses worldwide.
compare.shopify.leadivoFit: Leadivo is purpose-built for social sellers and COD businesses — with built-in WhatsApp, COD analytics, and a store ready in 2 minutes.
compare.woocommerce.knownFor: A flexible, open-source ecommerce solution built on WordPress with a massive plugin ecosystem.
compare.woocommerce.leadivoFit: Leadivo gives you a fully hosted, no-code store with everything included — no hosting, plugins, or technical setup needed.
compare.youcan.knownFor: An ecommerce platform popular with MENA sellers, with built-in COD support and Arabic interface.
compare.youcan.leadivoFit: Leadivo adds COD analytics, WhatsApp cart recovery, multi-market pricing, and 20 languages — helping you grow beyond a single market.
compare.salla.knownFor: A leading Arabic ecommerce platform popular in Saudi Arabia and the Gulf region.
compare.salla.leadivoFit: Leadivo helps you reach customers globally with 20 languages, multi-market pricing, COD analytics, and WhatsApp cart recovery.
compare.expandcart.knownFor: An Arabic-first ecommerce platform popular with Egyptian and MENA sellers, with built-in COD and payment integrations.
compare.expandcart.leadivoFit: Leadivo adds COD analytics, WhatsApp cart recovery, multi-market pricing, fake order protection, and 20 languages — helping you scale with confidence.
compare.ecwid.knownFor: A lightweight ecommerce widget that embeds into existing websites and social channels for easy online selling.
compare.ecwid.leadivoFit: Leadivo gives you a standalone mobile-first store with COD support, WhatsApp notifications, multi-market pricing, and fake order protection — built for social sellers.
compare.wix.knownFor: A popular website builder with drag-and-drop design and an ecommerce add-on for general online stores.
compare.wix.leadivoFit: Leadivo gets you selling in 2 minutes with purpose-built COD tools, WhatsApp notifications, multi-market pricing, and order protection — no drag-and-drop setup needed.
compare.bigcommerce.knownFor: An enterprise-grade ecommerce platform built for high-volume online retailers with advanced catalog and channel management.
compare.bigcommerce.leadivoFit: Leadivo is built for simplicity — get your COD store live in 2 minutes with WhatsApp, multi-market pricing, and order protection, all in one affordable plan.
compare.ecomadina.knownFor: A MENA-focused ecommerce platform offering Arabic-first storefronts with COD payment support.
compare.ecomadina.leadivoFit: Leadivo offers a more complete toolkit with 20 languages, multi-market pricing, WhatsApp recovery, COD analytics, Google Sheets sync, and built-in fake order protection.
compare.instagram.knownFor: The world's most popular visual social platform where millions of sellers showcase products and take orders via DMs.
compare.instagram.leadivoFit: Leadivo turns your followers into real orders — put your store link in your bio and let customers browse, order, and pay on their own with COD support and WhatsApp notifications.
compare.facebook.knownFor: A massive marketplace where sellers list products for free and connect with local buyers through Facebook's platform.
compare.facebook.leadivoFit: Leadivo gives you your own branded store with order management, customer database, COD analytics, and WhatsApp notifications — build a real business beyond marketplace listings.

apps.indexSubtitle: Powerful integrations built into your Leadivo store. Connect your favorite tools — no plugins or coding needed.
apps.ctaDescription: All integrations are built into Leadivo. Start your 14-day free trial and connect in minutes.
apps.whatsapp.heroDesc: Send order confirmations, delivery updates, and abandoned cart recovery messages directly via WhatsApp. AI-powered messaging in 20+ languages.
apps.whatsapp.feature.orderNotify.title: Order notifications
apps.whatsapp.feature.orderNotify.desc: Automatically notify customers when orders are placed, confirmed, shipped, or delivered.
apps.whatsapp.feature.cartRecovery.title: Abandoned cart recovery
apps.whatsapp.feature.cartRecovery.desc: Recover lost sales by sending automated recovery messages to customers who left items in their cart.
apps.whatsapp.feature.aiMessages.title: AI-powered messages
apps.whatsapp.feature.aiMessages.desc: Smart messages generated with AI based on order context, store language, and customer details.
apps.whatsapp.feature.statusUpdates.title: Status updates
apps.whatsapp.feature.statusUpdates.desc: Keep customers informed with real-time shipping and delivery status notifications.
apps.whatsapp.feature.reviewLinks.title: Review collection
apps.whatsapp.feature.reviewLinks.desc: Automatically send review request links after delivery to collect authentic customer feedback.
apps.whatsapp.feature.multiLang.title: 20+ languages
apps.whatsapp.feature.multiLang.desc: Messages are sent in the customer's preferred language with full RTL support for Arabic.
apps.whatsapp.step.connect.title: Connect WhatsApp
apps.whatsapp.step.connect.desc: Link your WhatsApp Business account with one click from the integrations page.
apps.whatsapp.step.configure.title: Configure events
apps.whatsapp.step.configure.desc: Choose which events trigger messages: new orders, status changes, or abandoned carts.
apps.whatsapp.step.automate.title: Messages go out automatically
apps.whatsapp.step.automate.desc: Messages are sent automatically. Track delivery status in the integration events log.
apps.meta.heroDesc: Track conversions and retarget customers with Facebook Pixel and server-side Meta Conversions API. Accurate attribution for COD businesses.
apps.meta.feature.serverSide.title: Server-side tracking
apps.meta.feature.serverSide.desc: Purchase events are sent directly from Leadivo's servers via Meta CAPI — no ad blockers can interfere.
apps.meta.feature.clientEvents.title: Client-side events
apps.meta.feature.clientEvents.desc: ViewContent, AddToCart, and InitiateCheckout tracked automatically on your storefront.
apps.meta.feature.purchase.title: Purchase tracking
apps.meta.feature.purchase.desc: Server-side Purchase events with full order data — value, currency, and product details.
apps.meta.feature.testMode.title: Test mode
apps.meta.feature.testMode.desc: Verify your setup with Meta's test event code before going live with your campaigns.
apps.meta.feature.retarget.title: Retarget customers
apps.meta.feature.retarget.desc: Build custom audiences from store visitors and buyers to run targeted Facebook and Instagram ads.
apps.meta.feature.accurate.title: Accurate attribution
apps.meta.feature.accurate.desc: Dual tracking (client + server) ensures you see every conversion, even with iOS privacy changes.
apps.meta.step.pixel.title: Add your Pixel ID
apps.meta.step.pixel.desc: Copy your Facebook Pixel ID from Meta Events Manager and paste it in Leadivo.
apps.meta.step.token.title: Add access token
apps.meta.step.token.desc: Generate a Conversions API access token in Meta Events Manager and add it for server-side tracking.
apps.meta.step.track.title: Start tracking
apps.meta.step.track.desc: Events are tracked automatically. Use test mode to verify before launching campaigns.
apps.sheets.heroDesc: Automatically sync every order to Google Sheets with customizable field mapping. Track orders, manage data, and share with your team in real time.
apps.sheets.feature.autoSync.title: Auto-sync orders
apps.sheets.feature.autoSync.desc: New orders are automatically added to your Google Sheet as they come in — no manual work needed.
apps.sheets.feature.fieldMap.title: Custom field mapping
apps.sheets.feature.fieldMap.desc: Choose from 20+ order fields and arrange columns exactly how you need them.
apps.sheets.feature.abandoned.title: Abandoned cart logging
apps.sheets.feature.abandoned.desc: Track abandoned checkouts in a separate sheet to follow up and recover lost sales.
apps.sheets.feature.fields.title: 20+ data fields
apps.sheets.feature.fields.desc: Order number, customer info, items, variants, prices, discounts, shipping, status, and more.
apps.sheets.feature.grouping.title: Flexible grouping
apps.sheets.feature.grouping.desc: Group data per order or per product line — choose the format that works best for your workflow.
apps.sheets.feature.manualSync.title: Manual sync
apps.sheets.feature.manualSync.desc: Trigger a manual sync anytime to backfill existing orders to your spreadsheet.
apps.sheets.step.connect.title: Connect Google
apps.sheets.step.connect.desc: Sign in with your Google account and grant Leadivo access to Google Sheets.
apps.sheets.step.select.title: Select spreadsheet
apps.sheets.step.select.desc: Choose an existing spreadsheet or create a new one to receive order data.
apps.sheets.step.map.title: Map fields
apps.sheets.step.map.desc: Select which order fields to include and customize your column headers.
apps.tiktok.heroDesc: Track TikTok ad conversions with server-side Events API. Get accurate purchase data to optimize your campaigns and reach more buyers.
apps.tiktok.feature.serverSide.title: Server-side events
apps.tiktok.feature.serverSide.desc: Purchase events sent directly from Leadivo's servers for reliable tracking that bypasses ad blockers.
apps.tiktok.feature.purchase.title: Purchase tracking
apps.tiktok.feature.purchase.desc: CompletePayment events with full order data — value, currency, and product details for campaign optimization.
apps.tiktok.feature.testMode.title: Test event code
apps.tiktok.feature.testMode.desc: Verify your integration with TikTok's test event code before running live campaigns.
apps.tiktok.feature.optimize.title: Campaign optimization
apps.tiktok.feature.optimize.desc: Accurate conversion data helps TikTok's algorithm find more buyers like your best customers.
apps.tiktok.feature.hashing.title: Privacy-safe
apps.tiktok.feature.hashing.desc: Customer data is SHA256 hashed before sending to TikTok — protecting your customers' privacy.
apps.tiktok.feature.realtime.title: Real-time tracking
apps.tiktok.feature.realtime.desc: Events are sent immediately when orders are placed for up-to-date conversion reporting.
apps.tiktok.step.pixel.title: Add Pixel ID
apps.tiktok.step.pixel.desc: Copy your TikTok Pixel ID from TikTok Ads Manager and add it in Leadivo.
apps.tiktok.step.token.title: Add access token
apps.tiktok.step.token.desc: Generate an Events API access token in TikTok Ads Manager for server-side tracking.
apps.tiktok.step.track.title: Start tracking
apps.tiktok.step.track.desc: Leadivo sends purchase events automatically. Verify with test mode, then go live.
apps.ga.heroDesc: Add Google Analytics to your storefront with one click. Track visitor behavior, traffic sources, and conversions — all built into Leadivo.
apps.ga.feature.oneClick.title: One-click setup
apps.ga.feature.oneClick.desc: Just paste your GA4 Measurement ID and Leadivo handles the rest — no code or manual script insertion.
apps.ga.feature.traffic.title: Traffic analytics
apps.ga.feature.traffic.desc: See how many visitors your store gets, where they come from, and which pages they view.
apps.ga.feature.behavior.title: Visitor behavior
apps.ga.feature.behavior.desc: Understand how customers browse your store — page views, session duration, and bounce rates.
apps.ga.feature.sources.title: Traffic sources
apps.ga.feature.sources.desc: Know which channels drive the most traffic — social media, search, direct, or referral links.
apps.ga.feature.realtime.title: Real-time data
apps.ga.feature.realtime.desc: Monitor store activity as it happens with Google Analytics real-time reports.
apps.ga.feature.free.title: Free from Google
apps.ga.feature.free.desc: Google Analytics is completely free — just add your measurement ID and start tracking.
apps.ga.step.id.title: Get your GA4 ID
apps.ga.step.id.desc: Copy your Measurement ID (starts with G-) from your Google Analytics property.
apps.ga.step.paste.title: Paste in Leadivo
apps.ga.step.paste.desc: Go to integrations in your dashboard and paste the measurement ID in the Google Analytics section.
apps.ga.step.done.title: Start tracking
apps.ga.step.done.desc: That's it — Google Analytics is now active on your storefront. View reports in your GA4 dashboard.
apps.yalidine.heroDesc: Ship orders across all 58 Algerian wilayas with Yalidine Express. Auto-create parcels, print shipping labels, and track deliveries with COD support — directly from your dashboard.
apps.yalidine.feature.auto.title: Auto-Ship Orders
apps.yalidine.feature.auto.desc: New orders are automatically sent to Yalidine as parcels. No manual entry needed.
apps.yalidine.feature.tracking.title: Real-Time Tracking
apps.yalidine.feature.tracking.desc: Track every parcel from pickup to delivery with live status updates in your dashboard.
apps.yalidine.feature.labels.title: Print Shipping Labels
apps.yalidine.feature.labels.desc: Generate and print Yalidine shipping labels with one click. Bulk printing supported.
apps.yalidine.feature.cod.title: COD Collection
apps.yalidine.feature.cod.desc: Yalidine collects cash on delivery and reimburses you daily with transparent fee tracking.
apps.yalidine.feature.coverage.title: 58 Wilayas Covered
apps.yalidine.feature.coverage.desc: Deliver to all Algerian wilayas with 1,400+ communes. Home delivery and stop desk options.
apps.yalidine.feature.status.title: Auto Status Sync
apps.yalidine.feature.status.desc: Order status updates automatically when Yalidine delivers, returns, or encounters issues.
apps.yalidine.step.connect.title: Install Yalidine
apps.yalidine.step.connect.desc: Go to Integrations and install the Yalidine Express app. Enter your API ID and Token from your Yalidine merchant account.
apps.yalidine.step.configure.title: Configure Shipping
apps.yalidine.step.configure.desc: Select your origin wilaya, choose express or economic delivery, and enable auto-shipment on new orders.
apps.yalidine.step.ship.title: Ship & Track
apps.yalidine.step.ship.desc: Orders are shipped automatically. View tracking, print labels, and monitor delivery status from your dashboard.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Leadivo™ ("we", "us", or "our") operates the Leadivo™ platform. This page informs you of our policies regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of personal data when you use our service.
privacy.collectText: We collect information you provide directly when creating an account, setting up a store, or placing an order. This includes your name, email address, phone number, and shipping address. Your city and country are also used to calculate applicable delivery fees based on the store's shipping zones. For store owners, we also collect payment and subscription details processed through our billing provider. We automatically collect usage data such as IP addresses, browser type, pages visited, and timestamps. We also collect approximate geolocation data (country) through IP-based detection to determine your regional market and display appropriate pricing and currency. When a customer abandons a checkout, we retain the cart contents and contact information to enable recovery notifications if the store owner has enabled this feature.
privacy.reviewDataText: To help build trust between buyers and sellers, customers can submit product reviews on storefronts. When submitting a review, we collect your name, star rating (1–5), written comments (up to 1,000 characters), and up to 3 photos per review. Review data is associated with your phone number to verify authenticity and ensure one review per product per customer. Review images are stored securely in our cloud storage. All reviews are moderated by the store owner before publication to ensure quality and relevance. Your review content may be displayed publicly on the store's product pages once approved.
privacy.customerDataText: When an order is placed, Leadivo automatically creates or updates a customer profile for the store owner. This profile includes the customer's name, phone number (normalized for consistency), email, city, country, and address as provided during checkout. Store owners can add tags (such as VIP or Wholesale) and notes to customer profiles to help manage their business. Customer profiles also include aggregated statistics such as total spent, order count, and order history. Store owners can export their customer database as a CSV file. All customer profile data is protected by row-level security and is accessible only to the respective store owner.
privacy.useText: We use the collected information to provide and maintain our service, process orders and transactions, communicate with you about your account or orders, detect your geographic region to display market-specific pricing and currency, calculate delivery fees based on your city and country, send abandoned cart recovery notifications via WhatsApp when enabled by the store owner, track order statuses (pending, confirmed, shipped, delivered, returned, canceled) for fulfillment analytics and COD performance monitoring, improve our platform and user experience, and comply with legal obligations.
privacy.sharingText: We do not sell your personal information. We share data with store owners to fulfill your orders. Store owners may enable third-party integrations that transmit order and customer data to external services, including: WhatsApp for order notifications and abandoned cart reminders; Meta Conversions API for Facebook ad conversion tracking; TikTok Events API for TikTok ad conversion tracking; and Google Sheets for order data syncing. When data is sent to Meta or TikTok, personal identifiers such as name, phone number, and location are hashed using SHA-256 before transmission. We also share data with law enforcement when required by law.
privacy.cookiesText: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to maintain your session, remember your preferences, and analyze usage patterns. We use a market preference cookie to remember your selected regional market and currency across visits. Store owners may enable client-side tracking pixels on their storefronts, including Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, and TikTok Pixel. These pixels may track page views, product views, add-to-cart events, and checkout initiation on the storefront. Purchase events are tracked server-side only through the Meta Conversions API and TikTok Events API.
privacy.securityText: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption in transit and at rest, row-level security policies on our database, and SHA-256 hashing of personally identifiable information before transmission to third-party ad platforms. Integration credentials and access tokens are stored securely and are accessible only through authenticated, authorized requests. Store owners can enable SMS OTP verification at checkout to confirm customer phone numbers before orders are placed. Verification codes are generated by our trusted partner Infobip, expire after 2 minutes, and are rate-limited to 3 requests per phone number per 10 minutes. Verification records are automatically deleted after 24 hours. HMAC-signed tokens ensure the verification result is tamper-proof between the verification step and order submission.
privacy.phoneVerificationText: When a store owner enables SMS OTP verification, customers are asked to verify their phone number at checkout by entering a 4-digit code sent via SMS. This process is powered by Infobip, a third-party communications provider. We transmit the customer's phone number to Infobip solely for the purpose of delivering the verification code. We store a temporary verification record containing the phone number (normalized for consistency), a reference to the verification session, the verification method (SMS), status, attempt count, and expiration time. These records are automatically deleted after 24 hours. We do not store the actual verification code — it is generated and validated by Infobip. A time-limited, cryptographically signed token is generated upon successful verification and is used only to confirm the verification result during order submission.
privacy.rightsText: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information at any time. You may also request a copy of your data or ask us to restrict its processing. Store owners can manage and disable any third-party integrations from their dashboard settings at any time. Contact us to exercise these rights.
privacy.contactText: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@leadivo.app.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Leadivo. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. Please review them carefully before getting started.
terms.accountText: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.
terms.subscriptionText: New accounts receive a 14-day free trial with full access to all features. After the trial ends, an active subscription at $19/month is required to keep your store and dashboard accessible. Your products, settings, and data are always safely retained — simply subscribe to restore full access at any time. You may cancel your subscription at any time, and it will remain active until the end of the current billing period.
terms.storeText: As a store owner, you are responsible for the products you list, their descriptions, pricing, and fulfillment. You manage order statuses through a defined lifecycle (pending, confirmed, shipped, delivered, returned, or canceled) and may use bulk actions to update multiple orders at once. You may configure regional markets with different currencies and pricing adjustments for your products. You may also configure shipping zones with delivery fees per country and optional city-level overrides; you are responsible for setting accurate delivery rates for the regions you serve. You are responsible for ensuring that your market-specific pricing complies with applicable consumer protection and pricing transparency laws in each region. When abandoned cart recovery is enabled, Leadivo automatically sends recovery notifications to customers who start checkout but do not complete their order; you are responsible for ensuring this complies with applicable messaging and consent laws in your region. You must comply with all applicable laws regarding the sale of your products, including consumer protection and tax regulations. You are also responsible for any third-party integrations you enable (WhatsApp, Meta, TikTok, Google Sheets) and for ensuring your use of those services complies with their respective terms.
terms.buyerText: When placing an order, you agree to provide accurate delivery information. Product prices may vary depending on your detected or selected regional market and may be displayed in different currencies. Delivery fees may apply based on the store's shipping zones and your city; these fees are displayed at checkout before you place your order. Prices shown are final for the selected market; switching markets may result in different pricing and will clear your cart. Orders are placed directly with the store owner, and Leadivo acts as a platform facilitating the transaction. Leadivo does not handle payments between buyers and store owners; all orders use cash on delivery (COD). Some stores may require phone verification at checkout. When enabled, you will receive a one-time SMS code to confirm your phone number before placing an order. This helps ensure accurate contact information and a smooth delivery experience.
terms.integrationsText: Store owners may connect third-party services including WhatsApp Business (for order and abandoned cart notifications), Meta Conversions API and TikTok Events API (for ad conversion tracking), and Google Sheets (for order data syncing). By enabling an integration, you authorize Leadivo to transmit relevant order and customer data to that service. You are responsible for complying with the terms and data policies of each third-party service you enable. Leadivo is not responsible for how third-party services process the data once transmitted.
terms.contentText: You retain ownership of content you upload (product images, descriptions, etc.). By uploading content, you grant us a license to display it on the platform. You must not upload content that is illegal, harmful, or infringes on intellectual property rights.
terms.reviewsText: Customers can submit reviews on products they have purchased to share their experience and help other buyers make informed decisions. By submitting a review, you grant the store owner a license to display your review, including any uploaded photos, on their storefront. Store owners moderate reviews to ensure quality and relevance — they may approve, decline, or remove reviews at their discretion. Reviews should be honest, helpful, and based on a genuine purchase experience. Review content must respect the rights of others and should not contain spam, promotional material, defamatory statements, or content that violates any third-party rights. Leadivo reserves the right to remove any review content that does not meet these guidelines.
terms.customerDataText: Leadivo automatically creates customer profiles from orders to help you manage your business effectively. As a store owner, you can add tags and notes to customer profiles. You are responsible for managing this customer data in compliance with applicable privacy and data protection laws in your region. Customer data you manage (tags, notes, and contact information) should be used solely for legitimate business purposes related to your store operations.
terms.prohibitedText: You may not use the platform to sell illegal products, engage in fraud or deception, distribute malware, attempt to reverse-engineer the platform, or interfere with other users' access to the service.
terms.terminationText: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms. You may delete your account at any time. Upon termination, your store and its data may be permanently deleted.
terms.liabilityText: Leadivo is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. Our liability is limited to indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform, and our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you in the last 12 months. We continuously work to ensure platform reliability and uptime.
terms.changesText: We may update these terms from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or platform notification. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance.
terms.contactText: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at support@leadivo.app.

faqs.title: FAQ Management
faqs.emptyHint: Add FAQ entries to help your AI assistant answer common questions.
faqs.questionPlaceholder: e.g. What is your return policy?
faqs.answerPlaceholder: e.g. We accept returns within 14 days of delivery.

aiChat.title: Help Assistant
aiChat.placeholder: Ask how to set up your store...
aiChat.error: Failed to get response. Please try again.
aiChat.greeting: Hi! I'm your setup assistant. I can help you configure your store, add products, manage orders, and more. What do you need help with?

aiDesignChat.title: Design Assistant
aiDesignChat.placeholder: Describe how you want your store to look...
aiDesignChat.error: Failed to generate design. Please try again.
aiDesignChat.greeting: Describe the look you want and I'll suggest style changes you can preview instantly.

integrations.title: Integrations

categoryDesc.analytics: Track conversions and optimize your ad campaigns.
categoryDesc.notifications: Keep your customers informed with automated messages.
categoryDesc.productivity: Automate workflows and sync data with other tools.
categoryDesc.shipping: Connect shipping carriers and manage deliveries.

integrations.uninstallDescription: This will remove the integration and its configuration. You can reinstall it later.
integrations.noSetup: No setup available for this integration.
integrations.scanQrCode: Scan this QR code with WhatsApp on your phone
integrations.whatsappConnectedHint: Order notifications will be sent via WhatsApp.
integrations.whatsappEventsDescription: Choose which events trigger a WhatsApp message.
integrations.whatsappAiNote: Messages are generated by AI based on order details.
integrations.codConfirmationDescription: Ask customers to confirm COD orders via WhatsApp before you ship. Customers reply to confirm or cancel.
integrations.messageLanguageDescription: Choose the language for WhatsApp messages sent to customers.
integrations.whatsappSetupHint: Connect your WhatsApp to send order notifications to customers automatically.
integrations.metaCapiDescription: Send server-side Purchase events to Facebook for accurate ad conversion tracking.
integrations.metaCapiSetupHint: Conversions API is active. Events are sent to Facebook.
integrations.metaCapiTestCodeHint: Find this in Facebook Events Manager → Test Events. Remove it before going live.
integrations.tiktokEapiDescription: Send server-side CompletePayment events to TikTok for accurate ad conversion tracking.
integrations.tiktokEapiSetupHint: TikTok Events API is connected and tracking events.
integrations.googleAnalyticsDescription: Add Google Analytics tracking to measure your store traffic and performance.
integrations.googleAnalyticsSetupHint: Google Analytics is active and tracking your store.
integrations.googleAnalyticsInvalidId: Invalid Measurement ID (must start with G-)
integrations.yalidineDescription: Automatically ship orders via Yalidine Express across all 58 Algerian wilayas with COD support.
integrations.yalidineConnected: Yalidine Express is connected and ready to ship orders.
integrations.yalidineFromWilayaHint: The wilaya you ship from. Test connection first to load the dropdown.
integrations.yalidineAutoShipDesc: Automatically send new orders to Yalidine as parcels.
integrations.yalidineEconomicDesc: Use slower but cheaper delivery instead of express.

googleSheets.title: Google Sheets
googleSheets.description: Automatically sync orders to a Google Spreadsheet
googleSheets.connectDescription: Sign in with Google to allow order syncing to your spreadsheets. We only request access to create and edit spreadsheets.
googleSheets.connectedBanner: Google account connected. Complete the setup below.
googleSheets.chooseSpreadsheetHint: Select an existing spreadsheet from your Google Drive or create a new one.
googleSheets.createNewHint: A new spreadsheet will be created in your Google Drive.
googleSheets.spreadsheetNameHint: This spreadsheet will be created in your Google Drive. All new orders will be automatically synced to it.
googleSheets.settingsHint: Configure columns, row grouping, and sync options.
googleSheets.columnMappingHint: Choose which fields to include and customize headers
googleSheets.rowGroupingHint: How order items are organized into rows
googleSheets.perProductHint: Same products are merged, quantities summed
googleSheets.perOrderHint: All items are combined into a single row
googleSheets.syncExistingHint: Export all current orders to the spreadsheet after setup
googleSheets.syncFailed: Failed to sync existing orders. You can retry later.
googleSheets.disconnectDescription: This will revoke access to your Google account and remove the integration. Your spreadsheet data will not be deleted.
googleSheets.insufficientPermissionsHint: You need to grant both Google Sheets and Google Drive access. Please reconnect and make sure all requested permissions are checked.
googleSheets.trackAbandonedHint: Log abandoned cart events to the spreadsheet alongside orders
googleSheets.filtersHint: Only sync orders that match these filters. Leave empty to sync all orders.
googleSheets.marketFilterHint: Only orders from selected markets will be synced. Leave empty for all markets.

events.title: {{name}} Events
events.empty: No events yet for this integration.

markets.title: Markets
markets.subtitle: Sell in different regions with local currencies and custom pricing.
markets.emptyDescription: Markets let you sell to different countries with their own currency and pricing. For example, create a "North America" market with USD currency and a "Europe" market with EUR.
markets.name: Market name
markets.slugHint: Auto-generated from the name. Used in URLs (e.g. yourstore.com?market=eu).
markets.slugLockedHint: The slug cannot be changed after creation as it's used in URLs.
markets.activeMarketNote: When off, this market won't appear to customers but stays configured.
markets.autoDesc: Apply a % adjustment to your base prices.
markets.fixedPricingNote: Use 'Set prices' to configure product prices for this market.
markets.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. This market and its pricing overrides will be permanently deleted. Existing orders won't be affected.
markets.priceAdjustmentHelp: Percentage applied to base prices. E.g. +10 means prices are 10% higher, -20 means 20% cheaper.
markets.roundingRuleHelp: How converted prices are rounded. E.g. .99 turns 12.47 into 11.99.
markets.autoRateDesc: Rate is fetched live and may fluctuate.
markets.manualRateDesc: Lock a specific rate for this market.
markets.manualRateHelp: This rate stays fixed until you change it.
markets.defaultMarketNote: Used as the fallback when a visitor's country doesn't match any other market.

pricing.noProducts: No products yet. Add products first.

exclusions.title: Product Availability
exclusions.subtitle: Choose which products are visible in this market.

billing.title: Billing
billing.gateDescription: Subscribe to continue managing your store. Your storefront remains live.
billing.cancelDescription: Your subscription will remain active until the end of your current billing period. No refund will be issued for the current month. After that, dashboard access will be restricted but your storefront will stay live.
billing.cancelNoRefund: Current month's payment is non-refundable. Access continues until the end of the billing period.

limits.blockedDescription: You've used all {{limit}} {{resource}} included in your current plan. Upgrade to Pro to create unlimited {{resource}} and unlock all features.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.description: Configure delivery fees by country and city.
shipping.noZonesDesc: Add a shipping zone to start charging delivery fees.
shipping.excludeDesc: Orders from this city will be blocked.
shipping.deleteZoneConfirm: This will permanently delete this shipping zone and all its city overrides.
shipping.duplicateCountry: A zone for this country already exists
shipping.duplicateCity: A rate for this city already exists
shipping.noCityOverrides: No city-specific rates. All cities use the default rate.
shipping.bulkCityPlaceholder:
One city per line, e.g.
New York
London
Paris
shipping.bulkCityHint: Add multiple cities at once, one per line.
shipping.thresholdHint: Orders above this amount get free shipping. Leave empty for no threshold.
shipping.csvDescription: Upload a CSV file with city names, rates, and exclusions.
shipping.csvTemplateDesc: Get a sample CSV with the correct format.
shipping.csvEmptyFile: CSV file is empty or has no data rows
